Stages.Description:
Low density swarm near abandoned gas stations.
Recommended squad: Brawler + Shooter.

Faster infected and tighter lane pressure.
Recommended squad: 2x Brawler, 1x Shooter.
Dense mixed wave before the city boss siege. Keep your line stable.
City boss stage. Overlord spawns begin toward the end of the battle.
Second map unlocked. Rusted docks and container chokepoints.
Waterlogged streets slow pushes. Spitters and heavy units dominate.
Heavy armor waves push through wrecked cranes before the final harbor boss.
Harbor boss stage. Overlord spawns begin toward the end of the battle.

Third route unlocked. Freight cuts favor splitter screens, saboteur dives, and brute-led pushes.
Recommended squad: Defender + Shooter + Mechanic or Breacher.

Molten choke points, saboteur flanks, and reinforced barricades reward higher bus damage and disciplined deploy pacing.
Recommended squad: Breacher + Defender + Marksman.
Steady heavy pushes, splitter screens, and saboteur feints test how well the convoy recovers between surges.
Foundry boss stage. Splitters, saboteurs, and crushers hold the line until the Overlord joins the furnace push.
Fourth route unlocked. Screening barriers and decon sirens set up spitter fire behind sealed gates.
Toxic wash tunnels punish overcommits while support infected stack behind the spray lanes.
Lab-side barricades harden up while saboteurs and howlers try to crack the convoy from behind.
Quarantine boss stage. Toxic purge cycles and sealed kill-box walls hold until the Overlord breaches the blacksite.
